description.initial: Following the star navigation, you've arrived at the southwestern dunes. The compass led you true. Somewhere ahead, hidden by the cliffs, your father's boat is waiting. The path continues east.
description.return: The southwestern dunes. Part of the star-guided path to the hidden cove.
description.atmospheric: The stars seem closer here, watching over travelers who follow their ancient guidance.

south.blockedMessage: Impassable terrain blocks the southern route.

items.itemMessage: You eat the sweet dates. A perfect desert snack.

interactables.name: Stone Cairn
interactables.examineText: A small pile of stones marks this spot. Others have navigated by stars and left these markers to confirm the path. Your father may have added to this pile.
interactables.interactionText: You add a stone to the cairn, joining the countless travelers who came before you. The path continues east.
